meaning: n.自我注射器(一种内附神经性毒气剂等药液的皮下注射器,可自我注射)
examples: If you or your child does have an autoinjector, be sure it's always available.
If I have an allergic reaction, do I need to use emergency medication such as an epinephrine autoinjector (EpiPen, Twinject)?
Replace the autoinjector before its expiration date.
